title: Three Queens
content:
Three sweet drivers hold the reins,
    And hold the places of my heart.
    A great people obeys me,
    But these three obey me not.
    Am I then a lesser king than love?

    From the Arabic of Haroun El Raschid (eighth century).
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator) delivers a powerful performance in "Three Queens"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
